headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Martin Marietta Materials, Raises Price Target to $730
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Keith Hughes   maintains Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) with a Buy and raises the price target from $710 to $730.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Martin Marietta Materials, Lowers Price Target to $731
